subject: [PATCH v2 5/5] mm/huge_memory: fold split_folio_to_list_to_order() into split_folio_to_order()

2026-07-14.patch_summary: This patch simplifies the code by removing an unnecessary function and directly calling another function from a third function. The removed function, split_folio_to_list_to_order(), had no direct callers and was only used by another function that always passed NULL as its list argument. This change does not introduce any functional changes to the kernel.
